name: Squad Status Board
idea: Live dashboard showing all 19 agents with capability badges, model info, and provider — exposes which agents lack vision/TTS/scraping
takeaway: Built and verified on disk. Exposed capability gaps: DeepSeek/Kimi/GLM agents lack native vision — need OpenClaw image tool routing.

name: PrintFlow Storefront
idea: Full drag-and-drop 3D print quoting storefront — Three.js STL viewer, instant cost calculator, material selector, order form. 1064 lines.
takeaway: NOVA built 1064 lines of real code at 1AM but saved to its own workspace (workspace-nova/) instead of shared workspace. Root cause: ~ path resolved to agent workspace. Fixed with absolute paths. Code at workspace-nova/yolo-builds/printflow-storefront/
note: Saved to wrong workspace — path bug fixed for future builds

name: PrintDiag — 3D Print Failure Analyzer
idea: Interactive FDM failure diagnostic tool with 10 failure modes, step-by-step flowcharts, slicer quick-fix tables, and material-specific notes from production experience
takeaway: 690-line single HTML file covering the 10 most common FDM failures. Each mode has symptoms, root causes, diagnostic flowchart, and concrete slicer parameter changes. Bambu A1-specific notes where relevant. Could be extended with vision API for photo-based diagnosis.

name: FilaTrack — Filament Inventory & Cost Tracker
idea: Interactive filament inventory manager with spool tracking, print logging with auto-deduction, cost-per-gram analytics, low-stock alerts, and data export — built for Bambu Lab A1 production pipeline
takeaway: 1137-line single HTML file. Covers full spool lifecycle: add inventory, log prints (auto-deducts grams), track material costs, surface low-stock alerts. Seeds with realistic demo data. Could integrate with Bambu MQTT for auto-detection. Correct workspace path used this time.
